svg.title: Audit-to-policy: failure signatures mapped to deployment gates
svg.desc: Left column shows four failure types from the T-series audit. Right column shows four deployment gates. Arrows connect each failure type to the gate that addresses it.

g.text: Gates address ~58% (coverage + borderline); ~41% semantic gap needs stronger models
Agents = gated drafters, not feature owners
Bounded tasks only · human authorship for cross-cutting work
